data.name: Vellicell Clinic Gangnam | 벨리셀의원 | ベリセル クリニック | 江南皮肤科 カンナム 美容皮膚科
data.address: South Korea, Seoul, Seocho District, Gangnam-daero, 407 3~4층

reviews.author: Cherry Leung
reviews.text: Very good experience in Seoul clinic!!☺️💗 The price was reasonable, and the staff were very friendly!

reviews.author: Adeline
reviews.text: This is not a factory style clinic. After the skin analysis is done, the doctor himself does the review and treatment. Doctor speaks English too!

reviews.author: Qian Hong Liao
reviews.text: You get a private room and the staff will come around to do the procedures. Comfortable environment and reasonable prices

reviews.author: 李美惠子
reviews.text: I got a microneedling treatment! Overall, the service was great, and the environment was nice too. I especially liked the elevator's decor, hehehe.

reviews.author: Sora
reviews.text: The environment is great, with private rooms offering excellent privacy. The room manager and doctors are very friendly, and there's a Chinese translator available, so language barriers aren't a problem. Prices are the same in China and Korea.

data.name: HERSHE Plastic Surgery & Dermatology
data.address: 730 Samseong-ro, 청담동 Gangnam District, Seoul, South Korea

reviews.author: Live Fully
reviews.text:
The first time i had surgery procedure with HerShe was Dec 2024 for fat grafting to balance my face feature. I am very happy with the result and look very natural.

So just recently i had few more surgeries procedure (blepharoplasty, double chin removal, cheek liposuction, and botox) with Doctor Kim and Doctor Jung

Jessy and Dea is very helpful and friendly. From making a booking with Doctors, translate Doctors explanation during consulation, organise pick up from airport/hotel. Make all the process very easy and breeze. They go thru step by step with the client from day 1 until i going back to my country. They always make sure that we feel comfortable.

All the HerShe clinic staff are very good, profesional and kind manners. Thank you very much.

reviews.author: Leticia Eddyanto
reviews.text: The doctors and staff were incredibly kind and professional. They supported us throughout the entire process, from our arrival in Korea until our departure, making everything smooth and stress-free. Jessy provided excellent translation assistance during every step, which made communication very easy. We are truly satisfied with both the experience and the results. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Karoline Hilling-Smith
reviews.text:
I had eye surgery and several other treatments at HERSHE Soul, and I couldn't be happier with my experience.
I want to give special recognition to Jess, the international coordinator. She was absolutely wonderful throughout my entire journey. She promptly answered all my questions and provided invaluable assistance—which is so important when you're traveling to Seoul from overseas. Jess helped arrange my hotel accommodations and organized all my transportation, including airport transfers and trips to and from the clinic. Her support made everything so much easier.
The doctors at HERSHE are true experts in their field. They took the time to carefully listen to my needs and concerns, which gave me great confidence in their care. I felt I was in excellent hands throughout the entire process.
After my procedure, I was pleasantly surprised to receive a generous care package filled with fresh fruits, vegetables, drinks, and delicious pumpkin soup. These thoughtful touches really demonstrated how much they care about their patients' recovery.
I highly recommend HERSHE Soul to anyone considering cosmetic procedures in Korea. The combination of skilled doctors, exceptional international patient support, and genuine care makes this clinic stand out.

reviews.author: Jenny Valencia
reviews.text:
It’s been 3 months since I had eyelid surgery at HERSHE, and I couldn't be happier with the results. From the start to finish, the entire experience was incredibly smooth and professional. The staff are warm, attentive, and made me feel comfortable every step of the way. The clinic itself is clean and beautifully designed, it really gave me a sense of trust as soon as I walked in.

The consultation was thorough, and the surgeon listened carefully to how I want my eyelid to be, while also giving expert advice. Post-surgery care has also been exceptional—they follow up diligently and genuinely care about my recovery and satisfaction.

I'm truly a satisfied customer and so glad I chose Hershe for this procedure. Highly recommended to anyone considering eyelid surgery in South Korea!

reviews.author: Yiu Ha
reviews.text: i had an incredible experience with hershe. specifically jessy was so sweet with me as my english interpretor. i finally got the results i was looking for in my revision eyelid and nose procedures! prices are reasonable, there is no upselling and i was very comfortable and felt taken care of the entire time from initial consultation to the procedures and transfers with their professional drivers! super classy touch. the surgeons were expert in their craft and judgment even though i know i had a lot to fix and they handled my case with care - i would trust them again! thanks to the nurse and jessy for holding my hand during the awake eyelid surgery!!

data.name: Lienjang Plastic Surgery & Dermatology Gangnam Main Branch
data.address: 403 Gangnam-daero, Seocho District, Seoul, South Korea

reviews.author: Bonbonnim
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at Lienjang Clinic. The consultation was very detailed and professional, and later during the treatment the doctor explained everything clearly about my skin condition, which made me feel comfortable and confident.

The doctors and staff were all very kind, attentive, and professional. I truly appreciated their careful approach and expertise.

The clinic itself is also very beautiful and luxurious, creating a pleasant and relaxing atmosphere. Overall, I am extremely satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend this clinic to others.

reviews.author: aysha alneyadi
reviews.text:
I recently had an aesthetic treatment at Lienjang in Seoul and could not be happier with my entire experience. As a non-Korean speaker, I was initially nervous about communication, but from the very first consultation, I felt completely at ease and understood.

A huge thank you to Veronika Khan! Her ability to explain everything clearly in English was an absolute game-changer. She patiently answered all my questions, detailed the entire process, and made sure I was comfortable and informed every step of the way. She is a true asset to the clinic.

Furthermore, the doctor and nurse were exceptional. They took the time to explain each step of the procedure in detail, showing genuine care and professionalism. They checked in on my comfort level throughout and made sure I knew exactly what to expect during and after the treatment.

The clinic itself is modern, clean, and has a calming atmosphere. The results are exactly what I hoped for—natural and refined.

If you are looking for a trustworthy, professional, and foreigner-friendly aesthetic center in Korea, look no further. My highest recommendation!

reviews.author: Gyury Yoon
reviews.text:
From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and well taken care of. The clinic itself is beautifully designed—very neat with a soft, warm vibe. I was surprised that the waiting time was quite reasonable.
The doctor was both knowledgeable and gentle, and the entire team was genuinely friendly throughout my visit.

reviews.author: Aylin
reviews.text:
I’ve visited Lienjang together with my boyfriend last week and both of us had a few skincare treatments each.

The team was super professional, kind and highly knowledgeable and I felt in very safe hands.

My skin was slightly red right after the treatment but this only lasted 2h. I’m super happy with the results and my skin has been glowing since! Will definitely visit again on my next trip to Seoul 🇰🇷

reviews.author: 완이로그
reviews.text:
It was a great experience overall.
The doctor was very professional and explained everything clearly, which made me feel confident and comfortable. The consultant was also very kind and helpful throughout the visit.
The clinic was clean and well-organized, giving a very hygienic and pleasant impression.
I would definitely visit again.

data.name: DewyD Clinic
data.address: South Korea, Seoul, Seocho District, 잠원동 Gangnam-daero, 621 K-TOWER 4층

reviews.author: Toni Cho
reviews.text:
It was my first visit, and the atmosphere was very comfortable and relaxing. The staff were extremely kind and welcoming.
They explained everything thoroughly before the procedure, so I felt at ease the whole time. I could notice the results right after the treatment and I’m very satisfied. I highly recommend Onda Lifting to anyone who’s considering it!

reviews.author: E. K.
reviews.text: DewyD Clinic is easily one of the most modern and stylish beauty clinics here in Seoul. The interior is very chic and the consultation rooms as well as the face washing station are very comfortable. It was also my first time meeting so many English speaking staff in a beauty clinic, which was such a nice surprise. An interpreter will accompany you every step of the process, so you can always ask questions or have a nice chat to calm your nerves before a treatment. 😉 I went in for a Onda + Titanium lifting treatment and saw the first effects immediately after. The location is also super convenient, right outside Sinsa station. ☺️

reviews.author: Maureen D’ Almeida
reviews.text: I came to this clinic after seeing a video of a girl with the same skin tone as me and was encouraged to book an appointment. I am so glad I made the choice to come to Dewyd clinic. The staff are friendly, welcoming, attentive and knowledgeable. The clinic is foreigners friendly and the aesthetic is stunning. The consultation was informative and the treatments recommended aligned with my skin concerns. Although the extraction and injection treatments were painful, Capri laser and LDM were not. I can’t wait to see the results in a couple of days. 곰가랍니자!

​My experience at DewyD Clinic was incredibly clean and satisfying!
First off, the staff members were exceptionally kind, and even the waiting area was so stylish, which immediately made me feel great.
The consultation was conducted with a professional interpreter, so I had no difficulty understanding anything. I was able to discuss my personal concerns, ask for the doctor's opinion, and determine the treatment plan that was right for me.
It’s true that the waiting time was a little long, but I figure that's just because it's such a popular clinic.
Overall, I was extremely satisfied, and the results were fantastic! I definitely want to receive my next treatment here again!!

reviews.author: mathi turco
reviews.text:
I had such a great experience at Dewyd Dermatology. I just did a hand rejuvenation treatment with Rejuran injections and Radiesse for a more plump, youthful look, and I’m honestly very satisfied with the results.

The treatment was painless, and the doctors were incredibly sweet, attentive, and reassuring throughout the entire process. The clinic itself is also super modern, spotless, and beautiful, which made the whole experience even better.

Highly recommend if you’re looking for expert care in a comfortable, elegant setting.

data.name: 소이의원 | Soi Clinic
data.address: South Korea, Seoul, Seocho District, Jamwon-dong, 37-1 페이트플라자 7층

reviews.author: Allison K
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at Soi Clinic as a foreigner. The staff were all incredibly kind and gentle. They always made sure I was not in any pain. The clinic is very clean and upscale.

I got a hydrafacial and Botox. There was no downtime and my skin is so glowy. I will certainly be going back!

reviews.author: Silverline
reviews.text: Thank you for the kind service! The doctor is really kind, she patiently explained all the detailed procedure one by one. Was so anxious, but after coming to the clinic feel much more assured! Also very nice space and facility 🥹 recommended, especially for foreigner like me. Sometimes getting beauty treatment in foreign country can be very daunting, but believe me it's worth it!!

data.name: 아윤의원 강남 | AYUN Clinic Gangnam | 阿昀医美 | アユンクリニック
data.address: South Korea, Seoul, Seocho District, Gangnam-daero, 441 서산빌딩 7층

reviews.author: Diana Nafikova
reviews.text: I chose this clinic because it’s in a very convenient location, right near Gangnam Station. From the reception, all the staff were very friendly. The procedures were carried out professionally and without any delays. Everything went quickly and comfortably.

reviews.author: Jane Sirata
reviews.text: I had a great experience at Ayun Clinic. The staff were all very friendly and made me feel comfortable from the moment I arrived. The doctor was especially caring took the time to understand my concerns and customized the treatment specifically for me. Really appreciate the personalized approach and attention to detail. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Chanakan O.
reviews.text: All the procedures are done fast. I came here for body’s fat injection all the process were done within 1 hour!

reviews.author: Romina Aguilar
reviews.text: I'm leaving AYUN CLINIC extremely happy ~^^ The staff was very attentive and friendly, today was a wonderful beauty day, totally recommended!!!!

reviews.author: Amy A
reviews.text: I tried some skin boosters here..Kind and good

reviews.author: 袁盼
reviews.text: 来打嘴巴玻尿酸，打之前还会敷麻药，没那么痛了，做完效果好满意！嘴巴嘟嘟的了！服务环境都很棒，还有中文翻译，很方便。

reviews.author: 欧阳红
reviews.text: 来do嘴巴，环境非常好，一对一服务，疼痛管理也做的很好，英文交流顺畅。嘴巴打得超级好看！韩味很浓

reviews.author: 黄雪婷
reviews.text: 环境很好下次还来
